allow: Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Stop-Process -Name HoneytokenWatcher -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 1; Write-Host done")
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Stop-Process -Id 34572 -Force; Start-Sleep 2; Write-Host 'Killed'; Get-Process -Name HoneytokenWatcher -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select Id,Name")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "
\\$psi = New-Object System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo\('cmd.exe', '/c taskkill /PID 34572 /F'\)
\\$psi.UseShellExecute = \\$true
\\$psi.Verb = 'runas'
\\$psi.WindowStyle = 'Hidden'
\\$p = [System.Diagnostics.Process]::Start\(\\$psi\)
\\$p.WaitForExit\(5000\)
Start-Sleep 1
Get-Process -Name HoneytokenWatcher -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select Id,Name
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "
\\$target = \\"\\$env:USERPROFILE\\Documents\\_AAAA_bank_statement.xlsx\\"
Write-Host '[ACL TEST] Running exact test from spec...'
\\$bytes = [byte[]]\(1..255 | ForEach-Object { Get-Random -Max 256 }\)
[IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\(\\$target, \\$bytes\)
\\$size = \(Get-Item -Force \\$target\).Length
Write-Host \\"[ACL TEST] PASS — wrote \\$size bytes, no Access Denied\\"
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Start-Process vssadmin -ArgumentList 'list shadows' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep 3; \\$a = Get-Content 'D:\\PBL RANS\\rdrs_alerts.json' | ConvertFrom-Json; \\$vss = \\$a | Where-Object EventType -eq 'VssDeletion'; if \(\\$vss\) { Write-Host 'VSS ALERT FIRED:'; \\$vss | Select AlertId,RiskLabel,ProcessName,@{N='Ind';E={\\$_.Indicators -join ','}} | Format-Table } else { Write-Host 'No VSS alert - HoneytokenWatcher WMI needs elevation'; Write-Host 'Alerts total:' \\$a.Count }" 2>&1)
Bash(cmd /c "taskkill /IM HoneytokenWatcher.exe /F" 2>&1; sleep 2; cd "D:/PBL RANS" && dotnet build -c Release 2>&1 | tail -5)
Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name HoneytokenWatcher -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 1; Write-Host done")

")
